notes.purpose: Stage 2 bidirectional translation SFT on Llama-3.1-8B + QLoRA. Target-only loss masking via make_sft_collator. Prototype-only; not a release artifact.
notes.gate: Requires: (1) HF access to meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B; (2) data/stage2/stage2_sft.jsonl emitted by scripts/330_emit_stage2_sft_jsonl.py; (3) Stage 1 adapter checkpoint at a known checkpoint dir. Set parent_run_dir to that checkpoint dir. Run --preflight before spending GPU time.
notes.lineage: Set parent_run_dir to the Stage 1 / merged-base output dir (must contain tokenizer files and run_report.json). --preflight validates tokenizer SHA equality and records parent_artifact_sha before any GPU work.
notes.hardware: Tuned for 1x A100 40GB (bf16=true, Ampere required). Adjust bf16->false and fp16->true for T4/Turing.
notes.lr_note: Stage 2 SFT uses a lower LR (1e-4) and higher warmup ratio (0.05) than Stage 1 CPT to avoid catastrophic forgetting on the LoRA-tuned Stage 1 adapter.
notes.data: stage2_sft.jsonl: emitted by scripts/330_emit_stage2_sft_jsonl.py from data/stage2/stage2_manifest.jsonl. Contains en->haw and haw->en directional rows. Off-git under data/stage2/.
notes.loss_mask: target-only — labels=-100 on instruction+source tokens; target tokens including EOS carry cross-entropy loss. Enforced by tokenize_sft_example + make_sft_collator in code/llm_hawaii/data.py.
notes.path_note: Paths are config-relative (relative to this file). Run: PYTHONPATH=code python -m llm_hawaii.train --config code/configs/stage2_prototype.json --preflight
notes.resume: If interrupted: PYTHONPATH=code python -m llm_hawaii.train --config code/configs/stage2_prototype.json --resume-from-checkpoint runs/llama31-8b-stage2-sft-prototype/checkpoint-NNN
